description: The UnlitMaterial component is a material that can render meshes without lighting at full bright. Optionally can render each vertex like a square that faces the user or a direction. It can also optionally render differently depending on which eye it is viewed from. This is used in the left and right cat item, and for 3D photos.
usage: Attach to a slot and use the material Component in the list of materials on a MeshRenderer or a SkinnedMeshRenderer with a mesh to view what this material looks like.
